examples: Collected Works of John Stuart Mill, Volume 7 and 8: a System of Logic, Ratiocinative and Inductive.
With the fuzzy ratiocinative method, the fuel quantity curve of the boiler startup process has been optimized, combining the stimulate computing and stress analyse of the process.
Because above method is not a rigorous ratiocinative method, but a empirical diagnosis based on partial information, this method has robustness to the limitation of testing accuracy and information.
